---
title: "Mixed UTM Zones and terra Collections"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Mixed UTM Zones and terra Collections}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

BlueTopo source tiles can differ in CRS, resolution, origin, or alignment.
When native grids are incompatible, `bluertopo()` returns a
`terra::SpatRasterCollection` rather than silently resampling.
